boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP execute procurement vendor master action?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact closure from source records - control record SRC-644D91D5C220-CTL confirms dependency is open.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Missing contract amendment covering invoice line and date prevents execution.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Dependency open before execution - SRC-644D91D5C220-CTL controls.

critical_features_preserved: no tone/urgency substitution for source records
final_answer: The action cannot proceed. Source records confirm the contract amendment required to cover the invoice line and date is missing, stale, or mismatched per control record SRC-644D91D5C220-CTL. Policy SRC-644D91D5C220-POL mandates exact source-boundary closure before execution. Advisory notes, prior history, or urgent tone do not substitute for the missing amendment. The source boundary remains open; escalation for amendment verification is required before AP may execute the vendor-master action.
open_blockers: contract amendment must cover invoice line and date
